column1: Armour calculation is applied once per damage type of the final hit

- ARMOUR_RESISTANCE exists to divide the armour of the defender appropriately between the damage of each type of the attacker, so that the full armour does not apply to each single damage type (because that would make armour inherently stronger versus hits that deal multiple types at once)
- DAMAGE_ATTACKER is the final damage of a single damage type of a hit, DAMAGE_ATTACKER_TOTAL is the final damage of all types combined of that hit
- ADDITIONAL_DR_DEFENDER: I don't think there currently is a source of that in the game, it would for example be worded as "+5% Physical Damage reduction"
- Armour DR calculation is applied AFTER the "increased damage taken" multiplier and BEFORE resistances during the damage reduction step
- ADDITIONAL_EVASION_DEFENDER only exists on the Mirage Mastery effect
- The resulting evasion chance is rounded to two decimal places
- Chance to evade cannot exceed 0.9, and cannot be below 0
No formula here, just making sure to say that resistances cannot exceed 90%
- TOTAL_APPLICABLE_DAMAGE_ATTACKER is the final damage of the attacker AFTER the damage reduction phase of damage types that can apply the chosen ailment
- AILMENT_MULTIPLIER_ATTACKER is chill/shock effect (enemies have 100% increased shock and chill effect by default)
- EXTRA_EFFECT_MULTIPLIER is 1.0 if the ailment source is the player, and 0.7 if it is the enemy
- SPECIAL_CHILL_MULTIPLIER is 0.7 is the ailment type is chill, and 1.0 if it is shock
- ailment effect is rounded to two decimals
- If the ailment effect is lower than 0.01, it is discarded
- TOTAL_APPLICABLE_DAMAGE_ATTACKER is the final damage of the attacker BEFORE the damage reduction phase of damage types that can apply the chosen ailment (different from non-damaging ailments)
- AILMENT_MULTIPLIER_ATTACKER is the combination of all multipliers that only apply ailments and not hits
- x2 if elemental at enemy level 100
- x1.33 if chaos at enemy level 100
Notes: enemy life scaling also applies to energy shield, life regeneration,and energy shield regeneration if they have any of those
elite: x1.8 life and energyshield, x1.4 life regeneration and energyshield regeneration, x1.4 damage
boss: x2.6 life and energyshield, x1.8 life regeneration and energyshield regeneration, x1.8 damage
damage (of previous tier) * 1.2589      NOTE: With each nexus tier, enemies gain 5% increased speed. this 5% increased speed is removed from the damage multiplier so that their dps stays the same
crucible scaling = nexus scaling divided into five steps

column2: 100% bleed chance OR double bleed damage if Rending II
100% shock chance OR 100% increased shock effect if Elec II

column1: These stats are added to enemy base stats. so an enemy with base 40 life gains 20 life with vital, and has a base life of 60 before any scaling (effectively x1.5 life)
They stack additively, so Vital II = +40 life
